selection_reasons.repair-falsify-5x3-efficient: pooled champion across 16 fresh panels: 86/204 exact; 39.7% weakest family

source: mechanical anchors plus iteration 19 Sol director

strategies.hypothesis: A single independent answer is the minimum-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Direct One

strategies.hypothesis: A small independent plurality is a stable low-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Five-Vote Plurality

strategies.hypothesis: Retain the pooled champion unchanged. Its parallel falsifying repair panel remains the principal replicated control for answer-generating review.
strategies.name: Efficient Five-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Retain the pooled champion unchanged. A broader independent bank paired with one falsifying repairer tests whether candidate breadth can be integrated without reviewer-panel dilution.
strategies.name: One-Review Nine-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Holding the five-answer bank and falsifying repair instructions fixed while reducing three reviewers to one tests whether extra reviewers dilute good corrections. It is also the clean call-efficiency probe against five-bank three-review repair.
strategies.name: One-Review Five-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Replicate the candidate-generation pipeline unchanged on the larger sealed checkpoint. The test is whether its established expanded-oracle gain continues and whether one falsifying integrator reliably converts that gain across families.
strategies.name: Blind Regeneration then Falsifying Integration
